name: ultimate-sports
description: Ultimate Sports: splash, server lobby, and sport loading for Pear.

scripts.preview: node -e "const http=require('http');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const mime={'html':'text/html','css':'text/css','js':'application/javascript','json':'application/json','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg','jpeg':'image/jpeg','mp4':'video/mp4','svg':'image/svg+xml'};const server=http.createServer((req,res)=>{const url=(req.url||'/').split('?')[0].split('#')[0];const file=url==='/'?'/index.html':url;const p=path.join(__dirname,file);fs.readFile(p,(err,data)=>{if(err){res.writeHead(404);res.end('not found');return;}const ext=path.extname(p).slice(1);res.writeHead(200,{'content-type':mime[ext]||'application/octet-stream'});res.end(data);});});server.listen(4200,'127.0.0.1',()=>console.log('http://127.0.0.1:4200/'));"
